General.Name: Streamex Corp
General.Description: Streamex Corp., a technology and infrastructure company, focuses on the tokenization and digitalization of commodity real-world assets. It offers institutional-grade solutions that bridge traditional finance and blockchain-enabled markets. The company was formerly known as BioSig Technologies, Inc. and changed its name to Streamex Corp. in September 2025. Streamex Corp. was incorporated in 2009 and is based in Winter Park, Florida.
General.Address: 2431 Aloma Avenue, Winter Park, FL, United States, 32792

3.Name: Ms. Christine M. Plummer
